_meta.description: Seed advisory database for NjordScan's dependencies detector. A small, curated set of well-known, real npm advisories. Ranges use npm/PEP 440-compatible version specifiers and are intentionally conservative. Each entry cites its CVE/GHSA id. This is NOT a complete vulnerability feed; it ships so the scanner gives real results offline. Update by adding entries below.
_meta.schema: package -> [ { id, vulnerable_range, patched, severity, summary, cwe?, references? } ]

lodash.summary: Prototype pollution in lodash via defaultsDeep: an attacker can modify Object.prototype, leading to denial of service or property injection.
Prototype pollution in lodash via zipObjectDeep / set-like paths allowing modification of Object.prototype.
Command injection in lodash via the template function: untrusted templates/options can execute arbitrary code.

next.summary: Improper CSP in the Image Optimization API: a permissive images.domains config can allow user-provided SVG to be served, enabling UI misrepresentation / stored XSS conditions.
Missing Cache-Control header on prefetch responses can let a CDN cache an empty reply, causing a denial of service for all users behind that CDN.
Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in Server Actions: a crafted Host header during a redirect to a relative path lets an attacker make requests that appear to originate from the server.

react-dom.summary: Cross-site scripting (XSS) in react-dom server-side rendering of attributes: certain attribute names could allow injection of markup.

axios.summary: Axios leaks the XSRF-TOKEN cookie value in the X-XSRF-TOKEN header to any host the client is redirected to, exposing the CSRF token to third-party sites.
Axios follows cross-origin redirects and forwards sensitive Authorization/Proxy-Authorization headers, leaking credentials to the redirect target.

minimist.summary: Prototype pollution in minimist: crafted arguments can set properties on Object.prototype.

express.summary: Open redirect in express via res.location()/res.redirect() with malformed URLs that bypass the intended host, enabling phishing.

ws.summary: Denial of service in ws: a request with many HTTP headers can exhaust memory/CPU when handling the WebSocket upgrade.

semver.summary: Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) in semver when parsing untrusted version ranges.
